title: Enhanced Realtime Chat App with User Avatars and Message Filtering

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Enhanced Realtime Chat App with User Avatars and Message Filtering

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
  <rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' rx='10' fill='#090a0f'/>
  <rect x='50' y='50' width='300' height='200' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='20' y='30' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='20'>User Avatars</text>
  <text x='20' y='60' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='20'>Search Messages</text>
  <rect x='50' y='220' width='150' height='40' rx='10' fill='#C06C88'/>
  <text x='20' y='230' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='20'>Filter Messages</text>
  <text x='20' y='270' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='20'>Filter by Keyword</text>
  <text x='20' y='280' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='20'>Search</text>
  <rect x='350' y='220' width='40' height='40' rx='10' fill='#B7D7CD'/>
  <text x='320' y='230' fill='#B7D7CD' font-size='20'>Clear</text>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Use the provided colors and layout structure.
Implement a search bar to filter messages based on keywords.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Enhanced Realtime Chat App with User Avatars and Message Filtering

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify the search bar functionality, message filtering, and real-time updates.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
